rationale: The Iran-US peace deal nearing signature is the most impactful development for Americans — potential oil price relief and end to a military standoff; SpaceX IPO and OpenAI lawsuit are secondary domestic market/policy signals.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal within reach; Hormuz reopening signaled
top_events.summary: A near-signed US-Iran deal could reopen the Strait of Hormuz, lowering oil prices for American consumers and ending a costly military standoff — tangible economic and security relief if finalized.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on stock market
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut pushes Musk to trillionaire status, creating a new market milestone that could influence tech sector sentiment and retail investor behavior in the US.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT
top_events.summary: A high-profile US lawsuit alleging ChatGPT contributed to a teenager's suicide adds pressure on Congress and regulators to accelerate AI safety legislation affecting major US tech companies.
